form.formComment: Freshened for 42 days. Last run ran on from midfield; ran last at Compiegne on March 2 over 3450m, 20 len behind Dream Weaver with 65kg at $23. Race before raced on speed throughout then finished second of 8 runners at Saint Brieuc on February 15 over 3600m, in the wet; 9 len behind Maverick Sivola with 72kg. Others read better. No easier here and happy to overlook today.
